title: tephrosia fulvinervis
intro: Tephrosia fulvinervis, also known as the yellow staminate pea, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Tephrosia fulvinervis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, powder, and oil, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties.
